scenarios.title: Test environment auto-generates auth token when SST is empty

gherkin.when: the config generator runs with TARGET_ENV=test
gherkin.then: config/generated/test.env contains SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN with at least 48 hex characters

scenarios.title: Dev environment preserves fail-loud empty token

gherkin.when: the config generator runs with TARGET_ENV=dev
gherkin.then: config/generated/dev.env contains SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN= with empty value

testMapping.label: Adversarial: dev env still fails loud

scenarios.title: Integration tests succeed with auto-generated token

gherkin.given: the config generator has produced test.env with an auto-generated token

scenarios.title: Each config generate produces a fresh token

gherkin.when: the config generator runs twice with TARGET_ENV=test
gherkin.then: the two generated SMACKEREL_AUTH_TOKEN values are different

scenarios.title: No hardcoded tokens in source-controlled files

gherkin.when: scanning all tracked files for hardcoded token patterns
gherkin.then: no hardcoded auth tokens are found in committed files
